title: Container Runtime Security + IAM Policy Analyzer — CIS Benchmark Enforcement
description: container_runtime.py implements image analysis, runtime policy enforcement, drift detection, and CIS Docker Benchmark checks with Aqua/Prisma/Sysdig parity claims. test_iam_policy_analyzer.py clusters here. Gap: CIS benchmark checks are pattern-matched against config JSON but not executed against a live Docker daemon or Kubernetes API, and IAM wildcard findings do not auto-create remediation tickets.
missing: Live Docker daemon integration: use docker SDK (pip install docker) to inspect running containers and apply CIS benchmark checks against live state
IAM finding → remediation ticket: when iam_policy_analyzer detects a wildcard or toxic-combo policy, auto-create a vuln_lifecycle finding with P1/P2 SLA
Container image signing enforcement: verify cosign/Notary v2 signatures before allowing image deployment; block unsigned images in policy-enforce mode
